rules.name: File Format & Size
rules.description: Standard PDF or DOCX under 2MB. Avoid complex graphics.
rules.check: File is parsed as standard text without encoding issues.

rules.name: Design
rules.description: Multi-column layouts, tables, and images can break ATS parsers.
rules.check: Detect if content has logical layout flow or complex formatting.

rules.name: Email Address
rules.description: Professional email address in the header.
rules.check: Presence of a valid email pattern.

rules.name: Hyperlink in Header
rules.description: Clickable LinkedIn or Portfolio links are essential.
rules.check: Detect URL patterns in the contact section.

rules.name: Quantifying Impact
rules.description: Every bullet point should ideally contain a metric (e.g., %, $, numbers).

rules.name: Repetition
rules.description: Avoid starting consecutive bullet points with the same verb.

rules.name: Spelling & Grammar
rules.description: Zero tolerance for typos in a professional resume.

rules.name: Essential Sections
rules.description: Summary, Experience, Education, and Skills must be clearly labeled.
